d002j_binding_constraint: effect_too_small: honest P4-sourced substrate-vs-null separation spread across 102 cells under Bonferroni alpha=0.05/102 is below the minimum detectable effect at a feasible per-cell seed budget; runtime (measured per-sim ~4e-5 s) was NOT binding.

d002k_design_response.narrowing_not_loosening: Denominator shrinks 102 -> 3 because the pre-registered hypothesis count honestly shrinks (3 windows x 1 metric), NOT because alpha was loosened at a fixed hypothesis count. Narrowing scope is legitimate design; loosening statistics at fixed scope is forbidden laundering.
snr_levers: single highest-SNR mechanism (direct public observables, lowest fake-network risk)
3 windows that are each a funding-liquidity event with strong public data
crisis-vs-matched-placebo contrast replaces diffuse substrate-vs-null grid

no_rescue_boundary: D-002K does NOT reopen, mutate, or rescue D-002J. D-002J remains terminally REFUSED at P7 (POWER_GATE_REFUSED_UNDERPOWERED). D-002K is a fresh, narrower lineage designed against the effect_too_small axis. The D-002J-P7 REFUSED verdict remains the truthful terminal outcome.
